# Image Freely

Image Freely is a free browser image editor at https://imagefreely.com/ for interactively cropping, resizing, converting, rotating, flipping, setting backgrounds, removing backgrounds, and metadata-cleaning image files.

Core capabilities:
- Single-image editing with a draggable crop box and live export preview.
- Convert browser-decodable images to JPEG, PNG, WebP, or AVIF when the browser supports the output encoder.
- Resize to exact dimensions and crop to freeform, square, 4:3, 16:9, 3:2, or vertical 9:16 frames.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Set transparent or solid backgrounds.
- Remove backgrounds locally in the browser with an on-demand ONNX model.
- Strip common EXIF and embedded metadata by re-encoding through the local browser canvas.
- Download the edited image.
- Use https://imagefreely.com/bulk/ for multiple images, shared output settings, and ZIP archive export.

Privacy and product boundaries:
- Image files are processed locally in the browser.
- Background removal downloads a model file from Cloudflare R2, then runs locally in the browser.
- The app does not require uploads, accounts, watermarks, or gated downloads.
- Browser support determines which input formats can be decoded and which output formats can be encoded.
- Animated images export as still images from the decoded browser frame.
- Very large images can be limited by browser memory.
- Background removal works best on clear subjects and product photos.

Likely search topics:
- free image editor
- crop image online
- resize image no login
- remove image background
- image background remover
- image compressor free
- image resizer free no login
- batch image resize
- convert image to WebP
- JPG compressor
- PNG to WebP converter
- remove EXIF metadata free
- photo metadata remover
- resize image for email
- resize image for social profile
